more.title: How the Skeleton of Mutapa Times is Based on Sarah Charlesworth's Work
more.description: Conceptual artist Sarah Charlesworth's 1979 study of how newspapers covered a solar eclipse inspired the framework behind The Mutapa Times.

more.title: Biti set for Mutare court appearance after arrest during ‘private’ meeting
more.description: MUTARE – Tendai Biti, the convener of the Constitution Defenders Forum (CDF), and the organisation’s programmes director Morgan Ncube will appear at Mutare Magistrates Court on Monday after being arrested by armed police on Saturday for allegedly failing to notify authorities of a private meeting. The two are being held at Mutare Central Police Station. [...] The post Biti set for Mutare court appearance after arrest during ‘private’ meeting appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail .

more.title: Back to court for Zimbabwean permit holders seeking to stay in SA
more.description: Anti-immigration group Operation Dudula announced on Friday that it is taking Home Affairs Minister Leon Schreiber to court over his decision to extend Zimbabwean Exemption Permits (ZEPs) by 18 months. That extension expires in May 2027. Operation Dudula – which has been accused of fanning xenophobia in SA – served a notice of motion on [...] The post Back to court for Zimbabwean permit holders seeking to stay in SA appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com .
